text_fr: 133 (Ill. Echange de travailleurs
text_en: 133 (Ill. Trade in workers)

text_fr: J,' Assemblée générale,
text_en: J, General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant examiné la chapitre III du rapport du Conseil  économique et social;
text_en: Having considered chapter III of the report of the Economic and Social Council;

text_fr: Considérant que le Conseil économique et social a  pour tâche notamment de  "développer la co› opération internationale dans les domaines écono› mique,  social,  de  la  culture  intellectuelle  et  de l'éducation";
text_en: Considering that the task of the Economic and Social Council is, inter alia, to "develop international cooperation in the fields of economic, social, intellectual culture and education";

text_fr: Considérant que cette  coopération internatio› nale doit se fonder sur une meilleure connaissance mutuelk entre les peuples;
text_en: Considering that such international cooperation should be based on better mutual knowledge among peoples;

text_fr: Considérant que pour arriver à cette compré› hension  il  convient de  multiplier les  contacts di› rects  entre les  divers éléments des populations de chaque pays;
text_en: Considering that in order to achieve this understanding it is necessary to multiply the contacts di› rects between the various elements of the populations of each country;

text_fr: Considérant que les  travailleurs sont trop sou› vent  privés des  moyens  de  connaître les  expé› riences techniques et sociales qui se déroulent dam les  pays étrangers;
text_en: Considering that workers are too deprived of the means of knowing the technical and social experiences which take place in foreign countries;

text_fr: Prie instamment les Membres qui y consentent I1 fixer  entre eux,  par accords directs, des condi› tion~  propres à faciliter  au  maximum l'échange des  travailleurs  qui  désireraient faire  des  stage., pour se perfectionner daê Ll connaissance de leur métier et étudier sur place les  problèmes écono› miques et sociaux qui se  posent à leurs camarades d'autres pays.
text_en: Urges those Members who agree to do so to establish, by direct agreement, conditions to facilitate as much as possible the exchange of workers who wish to take part in training courses, in order to improve their knowledge of their profession and to study on the spot the economic and social problems which arise for their comrades in other countries.

text_fr: Cent- dix-septième séance plénière, le  17  novembre 1947.

text_en: Expresses its interest in this important issue, and

text_fr: 135 (Il). Entry  into  force  of the  Protocol  of 11  December  1946 on  Narcotic Drugs

text_fr: The General Assembly,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Desirous of completing as  soon  as possible  the transfer from the League of Nations to the United Nations of  the powers  and  fonctions  relating to the control of narcotic drugs,
text_en: Desirous of completing as soon as possible the transfer from the League of Nations to the United Nations of the powers and functions relating to the control of narcotic drugs,

text_fr: Urges those States which have signed the Pro› tocol of 11  December 1946 on narcotic drugs but have not yet deposited instruments of acceptance, to deposit these instruments with the United Na› tions at the earliest opportunity so that the amend› ments to  the  previous  international agreements, conventions and protocols may enter into force by the end of 1947;
text_en: Urges these States which have signed the Pro› tocol of 11 December 1946 on narcotic drugs but have not yet deposited instruments of acceptance, to deposit these instruments with the United Na›tions at the early opportunity so that the amend›ments to the previous international agreements, conventions and protocols may enter into force by the end of 1947;

text_fr: Endorses the invitation  of  the Economie  and Social Council to ail Member States and all non› member States which are parties to the interna› tional agreements, conventions and protocols on narcotic drugs to become parties to the Protocol of  11  Deccmber 1946.
text_en: Endorses the invitation of the Economy and Social Council to ail Member States and all non› member States which are parties to the international agreements, conventions and protocols on narcotic drugs to become parties to the Protocol of 11 Deccmber 1946.

The Organization should give due weight, among other factors, to any evidence of genuine appear› hension and concern felt in regard to such plans, in the form case, by the country of origin of the persons involved. or, in the letter case, by the

text_fr: 135 (Il). Entrée en vigueur du Protocole du 11  décembre 1946 concernant les stu› péfiants
text_en: 135 (Il). Entry into force of the Protocol of 11 December 1946 concerning defiant persons

text_fr: L'Assemblée générale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Désirant achever le plus tôt possible le transfert à l'Organisation des  Nations Unies de.s  pouvoirs et fonctions exercés précédemment par la Société des  Nations  en  ce  qui  concerne  le  contrôle  des stupéfiants,
text_en: Desiring to complete as soon as possible the transfer to the United Nations of the powers and functions previously exercised by the League of Nations with regard to drug control,

text_fr: Fait  appel aux Etats qui ont signé le Protocole du 11  décembre 1946 concernant les stupéfiants, mais qui n'ont pas encore déposé auprès des Na› tions  Unies leurs  instruments d'acceptation à ce Protocole,  de  le  faire  au  plus  tôt  afin  que  les amendements aux accords, conventions, et proto› coles  internationaux antérieurs puissent entrer en vigueur avant la fin de 194 7;
text_en: Calls upon those States which have signed the Protocol of 11 December 1946 on narcotic drugs, but have not yet deposited with the United Nations their instruments of acceptance of this Protocol, to do so as soon as possible so that amendments to previous international agreements, conventions and protocols may enter into force before the end of 194 7;

text_fr: Fait sien l'appel du Conseil économique et so› cial à tous les Membres des Nations Unies et aux Etats non membres qui sont parties aux accords, conventions et protocoles internationaux concer› nant les stupéfiants de devenir dans le plus proche avenir parties au Protocole du 11  décembre 1946.
text_en: Endorses the appeal of the Economic and Social Council to all Members of the United Nations and non-member States parties to international agreements, conventions and protocols on narcotic drugs to become parties to the Protocol of 11 December 1946 in the near future.

text_fr: Cent-dix-septième séance plénière, le 17 novembre 1947.

text_fr: 136 (Il). Coopération internationale  pour empêcher toute  immigration  suscep› tible de troubler les relations amicales entre les nations
text_en: 136 (Il). International cooperation to prevent any above-mentioned immigration from disturbing friendly relations among nations.

text_fr: L'Assemblée générale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant constaté que ses résolutions 8 ( I) 1 du 12 février et 62 ( I) 2 du 15 décembre 1946 relatives à la question des réfugiés, et sa résolution 103 ( I) · du  19  novembre  1946,  condamnant les  distinc› tions de race et de religion, n'ont pas été complète› ment mises à exécution, et qu'il reste des centaines de  milliers  de  victimes  des  agressions  dans  les camps de personnes déplacées;
text_en: Having noted that its resolutions 8 (I) 1 of 12 February and 62 (I) 2 of 15 December 1946 on the question of refugees, and its resolution 103 (I) of 19 November 1946, condemning racial and religious divisions, have not been fully implemented, and that hundreds of thousands of victims of attacks in camps for displaced persons remain;

text_fr: Rappelant que l'un des principes de l'Organi› sation  internationale  des  réfugiés est  d'exercer "une vigilance  particulière dans  les  cas  oø  l'on peut envisager le réétablissement ou la réinstalla› tion  de  réfugiés ou  de  personnes  déplacées, soit dans des pays limitrophes de leurs pays d'origine, soit dans un territoire non autonome quelconque. L'organisation  tiendra  dûment  compte,  entre autres éléments, de tout facteur qui pourrait révé› ler quelque crainte ou inquiètude légitime de la part soit du pays d'origine des  personnes intéres› sées dans le premier cas, soit des populations auto-
text_en: Recalling that one of the principles of the International Refugee Organization" is to exercise "special vigilance in cases where the resettlement or resettlement of refugees or displaced persons may be envisaged, either in countries bordering their countries of origin or in any non-self-governing territory; the organisation shall take due account, inter alia, of any factors which might raise any legitimate fear or concern on the part of either the country of origin of the persons concerned or of the self-governing populations,
